industry_profile.description: Financial investment activities including securities trading, portfolio management, and asset allocation

authoritative_sources.authority_reason: Provides regulatory context for financial planning and analysis in capital markets

authoritative_sources.authority_reason: Establishes ethical and professional standards for financial analysts and planners

authoritative_sources.authority_reason: Provides regulatory framework for financial reporting and disclosure requirements

authoritative_sources.title: SIFMA Budgeting and Financial Planning Guidelines
authoritative_sources.authority_reason: Provides industry-specific budgeting and planning guidelines for financial institutions

workflow_stages.description: Creating annual and quarterly budgets for asset management portfolios
Tracking actual performance against budgeted figures
Adjusting budgets based on market conditions and performance

decision_boundaries.description: Acceptable variance ranges for budget tracking

domain_failure_modes.mitigation: Implement strict monitoring and approval processes

domain_failure_modes.impact: Poor strategic decisions based on flawed projections
domain_failure_modes.mitigation: Regular model validation and expert review

unresolved_ambiguity: Need to confirm specific regulatory requirements for budgeting in different asset classes
